action.reasoning: Observation: probe_grounding.py showed model generates natural language coordinates (x,y) but not structured box tokens. Need to fine-tune with grounding format. Analysis: Base Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct not trained for UI grounding with <|box_start|> tokens; we must format responses with those tokens and fine-tune. Using LoRA (peft) is feasible. Need to install peft. First iteration should be a quick LoRA fine-tune on small data to baseline and measure time. Decision: Write train.py with LoRA on first 500 samples, 1 epoch/100 steps, output to logs, then predict.py to evaluate. Submit eval after training to get initial grounding_score and iteration time.
